name: Bhagavad Gita
tagline: Read Bhagavad Gita chapters and verses
description: List Bhagavad Gita chapters and retrieve a chapter or individual verse with translations and commentaries.

auth.hint: Obtain an API key through the BhagavadGita.io RapidAPI listing and send it in the X-API-KEY header.

tools.name: list_chapters
tools.description: List Bhagavad Gita chapters in chapter order.

params.name: skip
params.description: Number of chapters to skip; defaults to 0.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum chapters to return; defaults to 18.

tools.name: get_chapter
tools.description: Retrieve one Bhagavad Gita chapter by number.

tools.name: get_verse
tools.description: Retrieve one verse with its translations and commentaries.
